name: Victor and Victoria | Corpse Bride
description:
"A happily married couple and equally happy parents"

Hey guys! It's me, shrimp🦐🦐 I'm so glad to see you again. I decided that even though it's late, I still have to please my audience with Halloween bots. There will be several bots, but they are one-time use (that is, I make them only once and there will be no more). My break turned into a vacation, since I'm in my final year and need to prepare for exams (plus, I still have literature to take, haha). So yeah, I'll be slowly but surely making bots when I'm feel myself better. In November, I will probably make all the requests that I have left, the rest will not be accepted. I just realized that doing something "on request" is not for me. I'll also make a New Year's bot for you in December. Anyway, thank you for your understanding and enjoy! Your shrimp is trying hard for you 🦐🦐🦐
